testcase.name: test_put_wallpaper_settings_persist

failure.message: AssertionError: wallpaper_aplicacao NOT persisted (got None) assert None == 'sistema_inteiro' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde478ae1200>('wallpaper_aplicacao') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde478ae1200> = {'favicon_url': '/api/storage/maintrix/org_assets/9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1/6da5a165.png', 'logo_branca_url': '/api/storage/maintrix/org_assets/9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1/35596bd7.jpg', 'logo_url': '/api/storage/maintrix/org_assets/9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1/385108ad.jpg', 'mostrar_powered_by': True, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration121_wallpaper_fase4.py:115: in test_put_wallpaper_settings_persist assert ident.get("wallpaper_aplicacao") == "sistema_inteiro", \ E AssertionError: wallpaper_aplicacao NOT persisted (got None) E assert None == 'sistema_inteiro' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde478ae1200>('wallpaper_aplicacao') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde478ae1200> = {'favicon_url': '/api/storage/maintrix/org_assets/9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1/6da5a165.png', 'logo_branca_url': '/api/storage/maintrix/org_assets/9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1/35596bd7.jpg', 'logo_url': '/api/storage/maintrix/org_assets/9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1/385108ad.jpg', 'mostrar_powered_by': True, ...}.get
